rules.name: waive_dead_apb_resp_state
rules.reason: APB_RESP is enumerated but never entered in sts_tniu_apb; waive the dead APB_RESP state line/branch/FSM items only.

rules.name: waive_illegal_default_state_recovery
rules.reason: The default case in sts_tniu_apb only recovers from illegal/X state encodings; with all enum values explicitly assigned, this branch is structurally unreachable in normal RTL operation.
